'''powayaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:icebound|icebound]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-w-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:icebound|icebound]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| powayaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:powayithi|powayithi]] || [[word:powayiji|powayiji]] || [[word:powayishi|powayishi]] || [[word:powayiki|powayiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:powayuthuthu|powayuthuthu]] || [[word:powayujuju|powayujuju]] || [[word:powayushushu|powayushushu]] || [[word:powayukuku|powayukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:powayuthu|powayuthu]] || [[word:powayuju|powayuju]] || [[word:powayushu|powayushu]] || [[word:powayuku|powayuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:powayufthuf|powayufthuf]] || [[word:powayufjuf|powayufjuf]] || [[word:powayufshuf|powayufshuf]] || [[word:powayufkuf|powayufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:powayethe|powayethe]] || [[word:powayeje|powayeje]] || [[word:powayeshe|powayeshe]] || [[word:powayeke|powayeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:powayothotho|powayothotho]] || [[word:powayojojo|powayojojo]] || [[word:powayoshosho|powayoshosho]] || [[word:powayokoko|powayokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:powayotho|powayotho]] || [[word:powayojo|powayojo]] || [[word:powayosho|powayosho]] || [[word:powayoko|powayoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:powayofthof|powayofthof]] || [[word:powayofjof|powayofjof]] || [[word:powayofshof|powayofshof]] || [[word:powayofkof|powayofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:powayÃŸfthÃŸf|powayÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:powayÃŸfjÃŸf|powayÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:powayÃŸfshÃŸf|powayÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:powayÃŸfkÃŸf|powayÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:powayÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|powayÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:powayÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|powayÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:powayÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|powayÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:powayÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|powayÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:powayÃŸfthÃŸf|powayÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:powayÃŸfjÃŸf|powayÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:powayÃŸfshÃŸf|powayÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:powayÃŸfkÃŸf|powayÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:powayÃŸfthÃŸf|powayÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:powayÃŸfjÃŸf|powayÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:powayÃŸfshÃŸf|powayÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:powayÃŸfkÃŸf|powayÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:powayÃḊthÃḊ|powayÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:powayÃḊjÃḊ|powayÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:powayÃḊshÃḊ|powayÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:powayÃḊkÃḊ|powayÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:powayathatha|powayathatha]] || [[word:powayajaja|powayajaja]] || [[word:powayashasha|powayashasha]] || [[word:powayakaka|powayakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:powayatha|powayatha]] || [[word:powayaja|powayaja]] || [[word:powayasha|powayasha]] || [[word:powayaka|powayaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:powayafthaf|powayafthaf]] || [[word:powayafjaf|powayafjaf]] || [[word:powayafshaf|powayafshaf]] || [[word:powayafkaf|powayafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:powayasha|powayasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:powayshÃḋsha|powayshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:powayrosha|powayrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:powaymusha|powaymusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:powayasha|powayasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopowaynkshÃḋsha|gopowaynkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopowaynkrosha|gopowaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopowaynkmusha|gopowaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopowaynkyasha|gopowaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:powawayasha|powawayasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:powawayshÃḋsha|powawayshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:powawayrosha|powawayrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:powawaymusha|powawaymusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:powawayasha|powawayasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopowawaynkshÃḋsha|gopowawaynkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopowawaynkrosha|gopowawaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopowawaynkmusha|gopowawaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopowawaynkyasha|gopowawaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:pewÃḊyasha|pewÃḊyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:pewÃḊyshÃḋsha|pewÃḊyshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:pewÃḊyrosha|pewÃḊyrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:pewÃḊymusha|pewÃḊymusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:pewÃḊyasha|pewÃḊyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopewÃḊynkshÃḋsha|gopewÃḊynkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopewÃḊynkrosha|gopewÃḊynkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopewÃḊynkmusha|gopewÃḊynkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopewÃḊynkyasha|gopewÃḊynkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:powfayasha|powfayasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:powfayshÃḋsha|powfayshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:powfayrosha|powfayrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:powfaymusha|powfaymusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:powfayasha|powfayasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopowfaynkshÃḋsha|gopowfaynkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopowfaynkrosha|gopowfaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopowfaynkmusha|gopowfaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopowfaynkyasha|gopowfaynkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
